author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 16 APPROVE. Added CubeClient::Stub variant (always-present, additive) + CubeRuntime::new_for_testing(device). unreachable! arms added in dispatch_binary!/dispatch_unary!/dispatch_matmul!/dispatch_unary_with_n! and Debug/read_one/upload_f32 sites. Phase 9 shape-mismatch tests refactored to use new_for_testing as primary; cascade_skip #1083 references removed. cubecl: 21+62+1+1 PASS. Pre-1.0 (v0.5.0) additive enum variant with all internal match sites updated.
